title: BoatFix
description: Lets you eat while moving in a boat using the W key.
body:
# BoatFix
Tired of having to stop your boat just to eat? With BoatFix, you can keep paddling and munching at the same time!

### Features:

- Eat while holding W and steering your boat – no interruption required.
- Works with all boats and edible items.
- Simple, seamless integration with vanilla controls.
- Lightweight and client-side only – works on any server without needing to be installed server-side.

### Available for:
- **Fabric x.xx.xx (No versions planned at the moment).**
- **Forge 1.19.2, 1.19.3, 1.19.4, 1.20.1** (more versions will be added soon).
